name: Garrison Elementary School
description: Come play pickleball at Garrison Elementary School in Dover, NH! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Henry Wilson Jr High
description: Come play pickleball at Henry Wilson Jr High in Farmington, NH! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: James W. Foley Memorial Community Center
description: James W. Foley Memorial Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rochester, NH. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Lion's Camp Pride
description: Come play pickleball at Lion's Camp Pride in New Durham, NH! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Little River Park
description: Little River Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lee, NH. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: UNH - University of New Hampshire
description: Courts have over heard lights that can be turned on when night arises until 1030

name: Woodridge Park
description:
There are 4 courts within the tennis courts that have taped lines and rolling nets PLUS one with permanent lines but no fencing or nets.

Open dawn to dusk.

Parking area
Playground
Skateboard park
Baseball and soccer fields
4 Tennis courts and 2 half-court basketball courts
Exercise/stretching area
Picnic tables, benches, portable toilet (seasonal)
open_play_schedule: Connect with "Driveway Bangers Club" on Pickleheads for weekly round robin sessions.
